items.summary: Extend the backend to store and manage user goals, including therapy milestone goals (e.g., 'Complete 1st session with Serenity', 'Finish 3 CBT exercises', 'Attend a group class') and personal wellness streak targets (e.g., 'Log mood 7 days in a row', 'Use breathing tool 5 times', 'Journal for 3 consecutive days'). Each goal should track: id, title, description, goal type (milestone or streak), target value, current progress, completion status, and completion timestamp.

Extend the backend to store and manage trophies/badges. Each trophy should be associated with a specific goal (awarded upon goal completion) and include: id, title, description, badge image identifier, date earned, and an optional session discount code or discount percentage it unlocks. When a goal is completed, automatically award the corresponding trophy to the user and generate a discount code if applicable.

Create a Goals & Progress page accessible from the main app navigation. Display two sections: 'Therapy Milestones' and 'Wellness Streaks'. Each goal card should show the goal title, description, a progress bar (current vs. target), and a locked/unlocked state. Completed goals should display a 'Completed' badge and the date achieved.

Create a Trophies page (or tab within the Goals & Progress page) that displays all earned and locked trophy badges. Each earned trophy should render as a full-color visual badge image with its title and earn date. Locked trophies should be displayed as greyed-out/silhouette badges with a hint of the goal needed to unlock them. For trophies that unlock a session discount, display the discount amount and a copyable discount code prominently on the earned badge card.

Integrate goal progress tracking with existing user actions in the app: mood log submissions should increment streak-based wellness goals; journal entry submissions should increment journaling streak goals; session completions with Serenity should advance therapy milestone goals; group class attendance should advance group session milestone goals; and breathing/grounding/reframing tool usage should increment corresponding wellness tool goals.

Add a trophy badge notification or toast that appears when a user earns a new trophy. The notification should show the badge image, trophy name, and a congratulatory message. If the trophy includes a session discount, also display the discount amount in the notification.
